positions.title: Senior Backend Architect
positions.description: Lead the architecture and development of distributed backend systems powering our enterprise intelligence platforms. You will work with microservices, event-driven architectures, and real-time data pipelines.
requirements: Expertise in Go, Rust, or Java

positions.title: Lead AI Research Scientist
positions.description: Drive cutting-edge research in machine learning and neural network architectures. Lead a team of researchers developing next-generation AI models for enterprise applications.
requirements: PhD in ML/AI or related field

positions.title: Senior Product Designer
positions.description: Design intuitive and beautiful interfaces for complex enterprise software. Create design systems that bridge the gap between sophisticated technology and human-centered experiences.
